name: codex-switch
description: A Windows desktop tool for switching Codex relay configurations.
author: Codex Switch

scripts.dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; electron-vite dev"
scripts.preview: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; electron-vite preview"
scripts.dist: npm run prepare:local-update && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable
scripts.dist:installer: npm run prepare:local-update && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:portable: npm run prepare:local-update && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist:install: npm run dist:installer && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$installer = Get-ChildItem -Path .\release -Filter '*Setup*.exe' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $installer) { throw 'Installer not found' }; Start-Process -FilePath $installer.FullName -Wait"
scripts.pack: npm run prepare:local-update && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
